description: Hedge overlay scorecard - scores whether the tail-hedge overlay is earning its carry. Walks the Hedge Planner daily record, models cumulative carry bled vs convex stress payoff captured, returns a cost-vs-cover verdict. data/hedge-pnl.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Hedge overlay scorecard - daily 05:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the 05:00 UTC Hedge Execution Planner, so it always scores against a fresh daily record.
